entry.title: Re: Can't access external services from BAS project on BTP Trial system
entry.content: I have the same problem, but I use Free tier plan.

entry.title: Re: Can't access external services from BAS project on BTP Trial system
entry.content: @Evgeni_pinigin, I will add that I also set up the Accelerator Hub as a valid destination in my BTP Cockpit: https://sandbox.api.sap.com but that did not solve the problem

entry.title: Re: SmartRecruiters - job board setup for Seek
entry.content:
The SmartRecruiters Community pages has some information about Seek enablement: SEEK Enablement with Enhanced Job Distribution - SmartRecruiters

Does this require the VONQ plugin to work in SuccessFactors do you know?

entry.title: Re: The future of data is conversational and agentic AI — Are you ready?
entry.content:
Let me know how the "word salad" works from your end, Martin!

I think it's really interesting how your friend, a lawyer, has a use case for AI that overlaps with our uses. It's always cool to see how these new tools are used in different industries. 

My sister is a teacher and we were comparing how we both use AI differently. She tends to use AI for building teaching plans. She tells me her approach is a lot more "catch and release" where she asks more broad questions and see what her results are and keeps tweaking what result she gets. She then gets inspiration of certain topics and starts to build content from there.

entry.title: Asset Year change
entry.content:
Hi Team,

During the Asset year change system is throwing the program error as attached in the screenshot. Kindly check and advice correct program to change the Asset year.

Thanks & Regards,

Praveen kumar Y

entry.title: Order Probability setting
entry.content:
In SAP Public Cloud 2602,
I would like to configure the system so that the order probability is automatically set to 100% when creating quotations for customers.
How should I go about doing this?

entry.title: Re: June Developer Challenge - CAP Knowledge - Task 01 - Common types and aspects
Change documet status change - user log
entry.content:
I am trying to find out who changed the status of change documents in CHARM. I can get it from individual CD, but, is there a report or tcode, which can help us to view the list of status change made by user with time stamp in change document?  

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change documet status change - user log
entry.content:
Hi,

Regarding your concern, you could go to tcode: crmd_order->input your change document number->go to menu 'Extras'->'Change Documents'->there you could see all the status change histories and the timestamp and the user who changed the status. You could sort the 'Date' and 'time' column in descending or ascending in case you need to check the history from the latest or from the oldest.

BR

entry.title: SAP IQ 16.1 : Cannot obtain license for on premise host / Linux
entry.content:
Using the license tool, the option to continue is not permitted.


--- Support Assistant ---
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: IQ Installation & Upgrade
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Other Issue

Q: Detail the IQ environment: exact IQ server version, OS version
A: 16.1 SP5 : Linux lx-npcomiqp212 4.18.0-553.120.1.el8_10.x86_64 #1 SMP Wed Apr 8 22:26:17 EDT DIGITS x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP IQ 16.1 : Cannot obtain license for on premise ho...
entry.content:
I understand you have an issue that could not generate license key for SAP IQ.

As I used your S-user * to simulate from my side, I can generate the key as the attachment.

Regarding to your issue, could you please kindly try to clean up the browser cache and cookies and restart the browser, incognito mode or try with another browser to see the result?

If you still have such issue, could you please kindly provide us the relevant screen shots showing the issue on your side?

Then could you pls kindly provide us the trace file as the following steps:

(1) download the free version of http watch (Http Watch Basic Edition) on http://www.httpwatch.com/download/ and install it

(2) activate the trace

(3) reproduce the issue

(4) stop tracing, save the trace to an .hwl file

If you company does not allow to install http watch, please kindly refer to KBA 1990706 - How to capture an HTTP trace using Google Chrome or MS Edge (Chromium) to get trace.

Then we will look into the issue further.

entry.title: Difficulties accessing the SAP Learning Hub subscription
entry.content:
I am encountering difficulties accessing my SAP Learning Hub subscription. Could you please help resolve this issue?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Difficulties accessing the SAP Learning Hub subscription
entry.content:
For support with SAP Learning Hub matters, please contact the dedicated SAP Learning Hub support team directly.

 To resolve your request, please follow the guidance in KBA 2404504 - How to get help with the SAP Learning Hub or SAP Training Center, and reach out to the Learning Hub team via the steps below:

  1. Go to SAP Learning Help Center to create a case
  2. Scroll down and click Create a case in the lower-left corner of the page.
Should you have any further questions regarding SAP for Me, please do not hesitate to contact us.

entry.title: Calling an SAP BTP Destination from the SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
When building extensions on SAP BTP ABAP Environment, you often need to call external HTTP or OData services.

Instead of hardcoding target URLs in your ABAP code, you can define a destination in the SAP BTP cockpit and consume it from ABAP. This keeps the endpoint configuration outside the code and makes it easier to change later.

In this example, I will call the public Northwind OData service from an ABAP Console Application using a BTP destination.

Create the destination in SAP BTP

In the SAP BTP cockpit, create a destination like this:

Name: Northwind

Type: HTTP

Description: Northwind OData services

Proxy Type: Internet

URL: https://services.odata.org

Authentication: NoAuthentication

After saving the destination, run Check Connection.

For this example, the check was successful:

HTTP request (without authentication) to Northwind destination succeeded.

The service we want to call is:

https://services.odata.org/V4/Northwind/Northwind.svc/Products?$top=5

Because the destination already contains the base URL:

https://services.odata.org

the ABAP code only needs to provide the relative path:

/V4/Northwind/Northwind.svc/Products?$top=5

Create the ABAP console class

Create a new global class in ADT, for example:

ZCL_NORTHWIND_DESTINATION_TEST

Use this code:

CLASS zcl_northwind_destination_test DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    INTERFACES if_oo_adt_classrun.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_product,
             productid    TYPE i,
             productname  TYPE string,
             unitprice    TYPE p LENGTH 10 DECIMALS 4,
             unitsinstock TYPE i,
           END OF ty_product.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_response,
             value TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_product WITH EMPTY KEY,
           END OF ty_response.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS zcl_northwind_destination_test IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.
    TRY.
        DATA(lo_destination) =
          cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_cloud_destination(
            i_name       = 'Northwind'
            i_authn_mode = if_a4c_cp_service=>service_specific
          ).
        DATA(lo_client) =
          cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination(
            lo_destination
          ).
        DATA(lo_request) = lo_client->get_http_request( ).
        lo_request->set_uri_path(
          '/V4/Northwind/Northwind.svc/Products?$top=5'
        ).
        lo_request->set_header_field(
          i_name  = 'Accept'
          i_value = 'application/json'
        ).
        DATA(lo_response) = lo_client->execute(
          i_method = if_web_http_client=>get
        ).
        DATA(ls_status) = lo_response->get_status( ).
        DATA(lv_body)   = lo_response->get_text( ).
        out->write( |HTTP Status : { ls_status-code } { ls_status-reason }| ).
        DATA(ls_response) = VALUE ty_response( ).
        /ui2/cl_json=>deserialize(
          EXPORTING
            json        = lv_body
            pretty_name = /ui2/cl_json=>pretty_mode-camel_case
          CHANGING
            data        = ls_response
        ).
        out->write( '===== PRODUCTS =====' ).
        LOOP AT ls_response-value INTO DATA(ls_product).
          out->write(
            |{ ls_product-productid } - { ls_product-productname } | &&
            |Price: { ls_product-unitprice } | &&
            |Stock: { ls_product-unitsinstock }|
          ).
        ENDLOOP.
        lo_client->close( ).
      CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(lx_error).
        out->write( |Error: { lx_error->get_text( ) }| ).
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

Run the class using:

Run As > ABAP Application Console

Key part of the code

The destination is consumed using:

DATA(lo_destination) =

  cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_cloud_destination(

    i_name       = 'Northwind'

    i_authn_mode = if_a4c_cp_service=>service_specific

  ).

Then an HTTP client is created from that destination:

DATA(lo_client) =

  cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination(

    lo_destination

  ).

Console output

The output should look like this:

HTTP Status : 200 OK

===== PRODUCTS =====

1 - Chai Price: 18.0000 Stock: 39

2 - Chang Price: 19.0000 Stock: 17

3 - Aniseed Syrup Price: 10.0000 Stock: 13

4 - Chef Anton's Cajun Seasoning Price: 22.0000 Stock: 53

5 - Chef Anton's Gumbo Mix Price: 21.3500 Stock: 0

This confirms that the ABAP class successfully resolved the BTP destination, called the Northwind OData service, received the response, deserialised the JSON, and printed the result.

Note about trial systems

During testing on a trial ABAP environment, the destination-based approach returned:

Destination error: Destination not found

The same destination-based code worked successfully in a non-trial SAP BTP ABAP system.

So if you see this in a trial environment, the issue may be related to destination visibility or Destination service integration in that specific trial setup, not the ABAP code itself.

Conclusion

Calling a BTP destination from SAP BTP ABAP Environment requires only a few lines of code:

This keeps the external system configuration in SAP BTP and allows your ABAP code to stay clean and portable.

entry.title: Re: when is my alm expiring?
entry.content: Hello @ greg_not_so, please rerefer to the following KBA for the detailed step by step for Cloud ALM provisioning 3632748 - How to Request SAP Cloud ALM ? - Comprehensive step by step guide. In addition, please use SAP for Me to open previously provided KBA 3164352. Thanks.

entry.title: Reassignment of Change Cycle
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

We are facing an issue while trying to reassign change cycle for some CHARM CDs.

We have a change cycle for the Upgrade project and one of the systems under this Upgrade is now taken off. Now when we are trying to redefine the cycle we are getting error due to open Cds, transports for the removed system .We have removed the system from SLAN, cancelled the CDs belonging to this system, but still not able to redefine the cycle as the transports of this system still there . We tried decoupling the TRs for this system CDs, but they do not happen as the RFCs are no longer there for this system.

We have tried to create a new cycle and reassign CDs from all the systems(other than the removed system) into it but since we have CDs with released TRs we are unable to do that as well.

Please do suggest how we can go about this situation .We do not need the CDs/TRs related with the removed system, but need the other system CDs,TRs .


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reassignment of Change Cycle
entry.content:
Hi,

Regarding your issue, kindly check KBA: 2521423 for more details about the prerequisites of redefining landscape of a cycle. You have to fulfill the prerequisites if the removed system is either dev system or production system. If the system is QA system, you could continue. Read this KBA for details.

BR

entry.title: Re: Focused Run Integration
entry.content:
Dear Roy, 

For the SSL handshake, please refer to links in SAP Host Agent side below:

Best regards, 
SAP Support

We have created a UN Listed substance in CG02 of Specification type LS_UN_SUB  and maintained Identifiers

Dangerous Goods Regulations,

Dangerous Goods Classes, 

Collective Number indicator 

& Transport Permitted indicator columns.

Thanks in advance.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Need to change PCR Logic
entry.content: Please clarify your query. Are you saying that if WT 2601 has a value greater than 0, it should process PCR ZZ05, but if not it should do something else? What Function are you using in your Payroll Schema to call your PCR, and are you using it with any particular Parameter? Have you tried to query the Amount of WT 2601?

entry.title: Re: Setup and Activation Guide: Joule in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
https://me.sap.com/notes/3661872

https://me.sap.com/notes/3721491

@abkanchan

entry.title: Re: Need to change PCR Logic
entry.content:
In a new PCR that will read WT 2601 specifically,  query it using Operations 

AMT= 2601   AMT?0

  for return value *    use Operation    ADDWT *

  for return value >    use Operation   GCY ZZ05 *

entry.title: Re: Optimizer is failing in case of Inbound Consignment O...
entry.content: Hi @Lakshmipati, Thanks for your feedback and yes, we are trying with same carrier assigned everywhere. In lane that carrier has priority 1, In FU same carrier is assigned, Resource is also assigned with same carrier, and CO already has the carrier. But it is still not working. Has anyone tried using optimizer for a consignment order having carrier BP assigned?

entry.title: Re: Integration between SAP CALM and SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content: Refer to https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2978003 as B. Configuration in SAP SuccessFactors is no longer required

entry.content:
Inorder to trigger the business with a report of expiring or expired materials , the Standard tcode: MB5M will be scheduled in the background, however the report format is not user friendly on downloading it in Excel.

I need to provide the business it in an ALV forma so that the report is clean.

entry.title: Installation of the SAP BW 7.5 on my local
entry.content:
Hi Community,
I have checked on SAP CAL it is not there, I have checked on various places as i need to check the migration from SAP BW(specifially not SAP BW/4hana) to Fabric but i am stuck here how do i get the SAP BW any version will work !

entry.title: Re: 1H2026 Release: A journey to Autonomous Payroll with SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll
entry.content: @Srikant23 Yes, you have to be on HANA for it. ECP Customers who are onboarded after Jan 1, 2025 are already on HANA. The customers from before that date should convert to HANA as outlined in this blog https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blog-posts-by-sap/modernizing-sap-successfactors-employee-central-payroll/ba-p/14002355

entry.title: June Developer Challenge - CAP Knowledge - Task 02 - Content for common reuse types
entry.content:
A set of common types and aspects is great, and our models are the better for using them. But what about actual data? There are some types, which are defined as associations to entities, and it would be useful to be able to have access to and load initial data for these entities. The types concerned are Country, Currency, Language and Timezone.

There is actually an NPM package available in the @SAP namespace that contains such initial data.

What is the name (including the namespace) of this package?

This is a question from the June Developer Challenge on CAP Knowledge. And don't forget: always submit your answer as a hash, on its own - read the Taking part section of the intro post for more info. At the end of today, this question will be updated with links to further reading on this topic.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Trial account - Unable to login to CIS Tenant URL
entry.content: I am also facing the same issue. I have subscribed to Cloud identity services in my BTP trial account, but not received any link/mail to activate my account in the Administrative console. Neither received the link for password reset. Are these any ongoing issues with the jobs in IAS that trigger the emails?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA Public cloud Issue While Performing Pick...
entry.content:
Good day @ashoktirumalasetti30 

Thank you for your question.

The API is the right standard direction but the picking and PGI steps must call the supported outbound delivery API operations with the correct HTTP method, URI, headers, CSRF token, and ETag handling.

For picking, use the documented picking operation such as PickOneItemWithSalesQuantity. This sets the picked quantity of the delivery item.

For PGI, use PostGoodsIssue in API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV;v=0002. See KBA 3539067 on the operational requirement of the current ETag.

The HTTP method error normally indicates that the ABAP backend call is not using the same valid request as Postman. Compare the Postman request and ABAP request for API version, URI, HTTP method, CSRF token, ETag, request headers, and payload. If you must pick multiple items in one call, check KBA 3615595, which covers updating picking quantities for multiple outbound delivery items in batch.

I recommend the following:

  1. Using the Communication Arrangement app, confirm the communication arrangement and API version.  
  2. Create the delivery through API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV.
  3. Read the deliver and item data.
  4. Perform picking by using the released picking operation with HTTP POST.
  5. Read the delivery again and capture the current ETag.
  6. Execute PostGoodsIssue with HTTP POST and if-Match.
  7. Validate the delivery status and material document in the outbound delivery app.                    
  8. If the same request works in Postman but not in backend ABAP, then treat it as an ABAP request construction issue first.
  9. Consider raising an incident if a fully correct documented API call still fails.

 

Here are references for more guidance

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/588780cab2774a7ab9fffca3a7f919fe/a4c5d84ecef2494985883829a24e393c.html?locale=en-US

3692008 - Unable to Create Subcontracting Delivery via Outbound Delivery API in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) - SAP for Me

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/588780cab2774a7ab9fffca3a7f919fe/ab6845012ee148ba9c2694648c2a0685.html?locale=en-US

Let me know if you have further questions.

Best regards

Chris

entry.title: Portal Workflow Inbox slow loading in SERP Portal
entry.content:
Some of our users experiencing slowness when accessing the Portal Workflow inbox in SERP Portal. CTRL+F5 and clear browser's cache did not help. We did the ABAP trace with the user, but the system response times are very fast, with execution times recorded only within a few seconds. We also clear the UWL cache, but issue persists.


Could there be any alternatives that I could look into?

entry.title: Re: June Developer Challenge - CAP Knowledge - Task 02 - Content for common reuse types
entry.content: (Please ignore the hyperlinked and uppercased "SAP" in the question text, it is the platform's automatic linking of @ prefixed names to members, read it as an @ symbol followed by 'sap' in lower case)

entry.title: Storage Location (SLoc) Field Not Editable on Main Delivery Item After Batch Split Determination
entry.content:
Hi All,


When automatic batch determination is executed, SAP creates batch split items under the main delivery item. After the batch split is created, the Storage Location (SLoc) field (LIPS-LGORT) on the main item (first line item) becomes non-editable/greyed out.

Our business requirement is to allow users to change the Storage Location on the main delivery item even after batch determination and batch split have occurred.

could you pls confirm any configuration is available for this requirement

regards,
Harish R

entry.title: @sap/cds-rfc Plugin and XSTRING Handling
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I have created a CAP project in NodeJS. All fine.

My challange is now to upload an image, which is stored in the ERP system as XTRING:

 

In NodeJS:

I created the payload with

if (payload.PICTURE) {
      const base64 = payload.PICTURE.includes(",")
        ? payload.PICTURE.split(",")[1]
        : payload.PICTURE;

      payload.PICTURE = Buffer.from(base64, "base64");      
    }

 

 const sys = await cds.connect.to("SYS");
    const result = await sys.send("ZMM_SET_PICTURE", {
      MATNR: payload.MATNR,
      PICTURE: payload.PICTURE,
    });

 

 

After sending the request, I am getting on the BTP the error:

"msg":"502 - Error: RFCClientError: [PICTURE] Buffer size exceeds the max length of 0\n at RFCService.<anonymous> (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds-rfc/lib/rfc.js:68:13)\n at async next (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:57:17)\n at async RFCService.handle (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:55:10)\n at async ApplicationService.<anonymous>

 

 

It seems that in the mapping of the cds-rfc lib there is a bug. While the lib is owned by SAP I cant patch it.

 

Any ideas, how or who can fix this?

Kind regards
Jens

entry.title: Re: New SAP Community - Profile Signatures
entry.content:
@thomas_jung Thank you very much for your quick reply. Just a little feedback: the signature generator is not working for me, even though I have authored several community posts 😕

Error: Die angegebene SAP Community ID wurde nicht gefunden oder zeigt keine öffentlichen Abzeicheninformationen an at c.loadProfile (https://devrel-tools-prod-scn-badges-srv.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/flp/profile/controller/App.controller.js:33:31)

Best regards,

Kerisha

entry.title: Re: I have changed purchase order text of a material item...
entry.content:
hi,

 
Do you require a change log? You can check this method: Long Text Change Log - Audit Trail - SAP Community

entry.title: Clarification Required on AUC Asset Value Display Before Down Payment Clearing
entry.content:
We require clarification regarding the standard SAP behavior for Asset Under Construction (AUC) procurement involving vendor down payments. We were initially facing an error during the down payment process for an AUC asset. After maintaining the required G/L accounts for transaction types KTANZG (Asset Down Payment Clearing) and KTANZA (Asset Down Payment) in transaction AO90, the error was resolved and the process is now working successfully.

However, during testing, we observed a valuation issue in the asset master and would like to understand whether this is standard SAP behavior.

Test Scenario

  1. Created a Purchase Order for an AUC a

entry.title: Re: June Developer Challenge - CAP Knowledge - Task 02 - Content for common reuse types
entry.content: 7cded1c8054b1905e0f1ea40d1042cbeb8fcaed799d61f98dfd1b8627145db8d

entry.title: Re: Title: Residual Delivered Value Remains in PO History After Complete GR Reversal
entry.content: hi, reverse in correct sequence. Always cancel postings in the reverse order of their creation. Cancel the IR first, then cancel the GR. You can also check the exchange rate differences between the GR posting date and the IR posting date. Lastly try to execute: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/spmm/3362168113.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: June Developer Challenge - CAP Knowledge - Task 02 - Content for common reuse types
Re: How to limit the users to use Joule Base
entry.content:
I realized what I want to do with Sravan's suggestion.

I changed the parameter of "Exposure Role Selection" from "ALL" to "SELECTION" in communication arrangement "SAP_COM_0647" and also changed the parameter of "Plug-In Activation State" from blank to "ROLE" in communication arrangement "SAP_COM_0882".

Communication Arrangement: SAP_COM_0647

Communication Arrangement: SAP_COM_0882

 

To affect this setting, the business role who should use Joule should be transferred to BTP with the flag of "Exposed to SAP BTP".

Maintain Business Role

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Sales areas of Bill-To Party and the service transact...
entry.content:
Greetings @DequanXu,

we had a similar issue while implementing SAP Service. We are struggling a bit to understand the organizational structure creation and assignment to SD structure. We used "Copy SD Sales Structure" functionality to initially create our organizational units and business partners. In next step we assigned Sales Organizations in Service to SD Sales Organizations and Sales Groups in Service to SD Sales Groups.

What we are struggling to understand is how this configuration is transferred between systems and clients. Once we opened the target client for customizing and manually completed the configuartion the error was not present.

We came to the conclusion that the following steps need to be performed on all system and and clients (to transport requests):

  • Copy SD Sales Structure
  • Assign Sales Organizations in Service to SD Sales Organizations
  • Assign Sales Offices in Service to SD Sales Offices
  • Assign Sales Groups in Service to SD Sales Groups
  • Assign Service Organizations to SD Planning Plants

We haven't found any official SAP documentation regarding this configuration We are just wondering if our conclusions are correct. 

Thank you for your help.
Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: Best compatible Warehouse scanners and label printers for S4 HANA public cloud
entry.content: also very much interested in this. we want to run a POC on leveraging just SAP Mobile Start on either ipads or zebra devices. What are others using in the daily reality?

We have a requirement to restrict the storage location during MIGO posting for movement type 311. Kindly suggest the appropriate BAdI or user exit that can be used to implement this validation.

Note
Please do not suggest authorization checks for storage locations.

entry.title: Re: Converting Property Graphs to Knowledge Graphs in SAP HANA Cloud: A Simple Guide

Hi @shabana ,

  Along with above one I am having one more query as I have enabled triple store at advanced settings, but I am still facing issue to work with RDF one.

entry.title: Verify RAP Compatibility on SAP S/4HANA 2020 On-Premise?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to confirm whether my SAP landscape supports SAP RAP (RESTful Application Programming Model) development and deployment.

Current system details:

  • SAP S/4HANA On-Premise 2020

  • Database: SAP HANA 2.0 (Release 2.00.086.00.1751264911)

  • SAP Logon 760

  • Development Tool: ABAP Development Tools (ADT) in Eclipse

I would like to know:

  1. Does SAP S/4HANA On-Premise 2020 support RAP development and are managed and unmanaged RAP scenarios both supported in this release?

  2. Can RAP applications be developed, deployed, and consumed as SAP Fiori applications directly from this system?

  3. Are there any minimum ADT, SAP_BASIS, SAP_ABA, or backend component requirements that should be verified before starting RAP development?

  4. Is there a recommended transaction, SAP Note, or system check to confirm RAP readiness in the backend?

Additionally, what is the recommended approach to verify RAP compatibility on an on-premise system?

Any guidance on prerequisites, limitations, compatibility checks, or experiences with RAP on S/4HANA 2020 would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in Advance.

Research and Development  SAP Enterprise Support SAP S/4HANA for product compliance

entry.title: Re: SAP Bussiness One FAT-Client UI Display Issues
entry.content: Hi Johan, Thanks for your explanation. We still need to check the user settings. I can already answer a few points: - Yes, Coresuite and our add-on add various menu items, but only under “Modules,” not at the top of the main menu. - No, as far as we can tell, the problem occurs after some time when different forms are open - The menus are all fine when the client and add-ons are launched - Minimizing/maximizing the client does not resolve the issue; the client must be restarted Best regards, Marco

entry.title: Re: AMS vs XSUAA: The Future of Authentication and Authorization in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Even after almost an year I find most clams here to be not convincing. Are there more recent posts/material clarifying the claims made here about AMS?

Key Advantages of IAS + AMS

Central Login: SSO was always possible with XSUUA integration with IDP, XSUAA was never an IDP, AMS is also not one.

Shared Roles: What are roles? AMS has policies. Policies from multiple applications cannot be combined

Cross Environment Access: Who wants this and what is it any way? One would typically not use the IDP for production environment for non-production environment. 

Future Proof: Which SAP applications/industry solutions are using AMS?

Corporate Integration: Each App needs to be configured to use corporate IDP when using IAS. 

Comparison Table

Authentication: It is the same; AMS is not a authentication module. XSUAA can use IAS for authentication

Authorization: There is a change in what is configured and how it is configured. But it is the same.

Role reuse: There is no term "role" in AMS and there is no reuse of policies across applications, whatever that means

User Directory: XSUAA does not have one, AMS does not have one. Both uses User Directory in IAS.

Corporate IDP: XSUAA can use corporate IDP integration done in IAS. It does not need configuration for individual apps one configuration is done for a subaccount. 

 SSO: What is limited about XSUAA's support for SSO? Anyways SSO is an IAS functionality, not a functionality of AMS

SAP Recommendation: Which are the SAP products using this?

entry.title: Re: ABAP Extensibility Guide – Clean Core for SAP S/4HANA Cloud - August 2025 Update
entry.content:
When implementing SAP Cloud ERP Private Edition or even an On-Prem variant, there are still loads of objects that are technically not clean core, but still advised by SAP and in many cases the only solution. You don't want your ATC scans to be clogged up by those objects, you want to focus on the things that really need attention.

Recently came across Project Kernseife, which helps you in that regard. It's an initiative by SAP employees, with close connections to developer teams. As an added bonus, it classifies objects in levels ABCD instead of the default priority 123. Currently using it at one of our customers, it does seem to put things in perspective a bit better.

entry.title: Re: CG02-Enter char. values for the dangerous goods data...
entry.content:
First you have to maintain the dangerous goods regulation and the dangerous goods class before you can enter a risk potential.  Depending on the regulation you entered you may also have to maintain the collective number and the transport permitted. Save it and then you can move on to the tab Risk Classification.

 

Best regards,

Ralph

entry.title: Re: Is LLM fine-tuning really dead?
entry.content: @jaripie   In practice, if I can get consistent, structured output with prompting + schema validation (and maybe a retry loop) at a high success rate, I stay in RAG/prompting land, and I would switch to fine-tuning when failures are costly, prompts get brittle, or retries add too much overhead.

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud Label printing with templates stored on printer
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Can’t Share Insight Tiles in S/4HANA Public Cloud? Here’s a Simple Workaround
entry.content:
✔️Quick Solution

In S/4HANA Public Cloud, Insight Tiles cannot be centrally distributed to other users.

👉Workaround:
You can share Insight Tiles via export/import using a TXT file in the Manage Tiles app.

✔️When do you need this?

  • You want to share dashboards across users
  • You need consistent reporting views
  • You want to avoid manual recreation of tiles

In this blog post, I’ll walk you through a practical step-by-step guide - and highlight the opportunity for improvement.

👉This workaround can save hours of manual tile recreation across teams.

The Challenge

Insight Tiles are a powerful personalization feature in S/4HANA Public Cloud, helping users monitor KPIs and access reports efficiently.

However:

❌Tiles are user-specific
❌No central distribution mechanism
❌No role-based assignment

👉This becomes a major limitation in larger organizations, where standardization is key.

The Workaround: Sharing Tiles via Export & Import

Since there is no centralized solution available, in this blog post I’ll walk you through a practical workaround.

Here’s how it works:

Step-by-Step Guide

1️⃣  Create a Report View

  • Open the relevant app (e.g. Manage Purchase Orders).
  • Create and save a view (e.g. “PO – Output Rejected”)
  • Mark it as public.

2️⃣  Create an Insight Tile

  • Save the view as a tile
  • Add it to your My Home page

3️⃣  Navigate to Tile Management

  • Navigate to My Home
  • Open Manage Tiles

4️⃣  Export the Tiles

  • Go to Advanced
  • Select Export to File
👉The system generates a TXT file containing the tile configuration

5️⃣  Share and Import the Tiles

  • Share the TXT file with other users
  • They can import it via:
    • Manage Tiles → Advanced → Import from File

✔️After import:

  • The tile appears under Favorites
  • It can be moved to Insight Tiles using “Add Tiles”

💡Practical Tip

Use a naming convention for shared tiles, for example:

  • TEAM_PO_MONITORING
  • FIN_AP_OVERVIEW

👉This helps ensure consistency and makes shared tiles easier to identify.

🚧Limitation

While this workaround works, it is not scalable:

  • Manual file sharing required
  • No central governance
  • No automatic updates

👉In larger organizations, this leads to inconsistent dashboards and additional effort.

💡Opportunity for Improvement

Ideally, Insight Tiles should be:

  • Created centrally
  • Assigned via business roles
  • Automatically distributed via the launchpad

👉This would align with core S/4HANA Public Cloud principles:

  • Role-based access
  • Centralized UI management
  • Reduced operational complexity

Conclusion

Insight Tiles are a powerful feature - but their full potential is limited by a lack of centralized distribution.

✔️  Export/import provides a temporary solution
❌  Manual effort does not scale
🔜  Central tile management would unlock real value

If you agree that Insight Tiles should be centrally managed and distributed, please vote to Idea # 374703 Addition of Custom Tiles to Launchpad Pages for all users by System Admin on SAP Influence and help move this enhancement forward.

💬Your Thoughts?

👉Are you currently using Insight Tiles in your organization?
👉How do you handle sharing today?

Feel free to share your approach in the comments - and if this helped, a like 👍 is always appreciated!

References

  • My Home in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Help Portal
  • Improvement Request Details - 374703 Addition of Custom Tiles to Launchpad Pages for all users by System Admin

entry.title: Re: Restricting Storage Location in MIGO posting
entry.content:
Why don't you want to use standard storage location authorization checks as described in the note 1668678 - No authorization check for storage locations in inventory management (SAP ERP & SAP S/4 HANA)?

That would be the cleanest core solution.

as it is requested to have an additional test environment, is it also necessary to have an additional LMS tenant, as only one test tenant is delivered?

In addition, there then is only Dev environment what also is handled like productive system, is this an issue?

Is it possible to convert the person centric model back by an instance copy again?

Best regards

Romina

entry.title: Re: New SAP Community - Profile Signatures
entry.content: Unfortunately, it doesn't work for me either:

entry.title: Logs or change history of planned orders
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently trying to analyze the change history of a planned order (table PLAF) in S/4HANA, but I am facing some limitations and I would appreciate your guidance.

So far, I have checked the following:

  • Table PLAF

    • PUSER → shows the user who created the planned order
    • AEDAT → shows the last change date
    • However, there is no field for “last changed by” job-user

From what I can see, it looks like:

  • The planned order was modified (likely by an MRP job),
  • But I cannot identify who performed previous changes or see any history.

    Thank you!

entry.title: SQL Anywhere for Windows do not have SDK
entry.content:
Hi, ALL,

 

I just tried to get the SQL Anywhere client for Windows and install it on my development machine.

Installation went fine, however it does not have nether SDK, nor the library for a C/C++ development.

 

Is this  intentional?

Thank you.

entry.title: ODATA services not found in BTP cockpit
entry.content:
Hello, i am connecting my on premises system to BAS.
1. Cloud connector setup is done and connection is fine between cloud connector and On premises system . on checking connection it says - "Backend is reachable from cloud connector".

2. Configures on premises system from BAS, entered all the variables like WebIDEUsage, WebIDEEnabled, HTML5.DynamicDestination, HTML5.Timeout

3. Getting below error when opening ON premises system from BAS - "

Could not get v2 and v4 services."
4. /IWFND/CONFIG is published in /n/IWFND/V4_ADMIN
5. Tcode- /n /IWFND/ERROR_LOG is showing error - Service '/IWFND/CATALOG' version '0002' repository 'DEFAULT' not registered
6. While accessing url - https:///sap/opu/odata4/iwfnd/config/default/iwfnd/catalog/0002/ServiceGroups?$expand=DefaultSystem(...
getting error 
"Service '/IWFND/CATALOG' version '0002' repository 'DEFAULT' not registered",

but as i mentioned /IWFND/CONFIG is already registered.

So, help me in setting up connection between BAS and On premises ERP

entry.title: Hands-on Practice for SAP Business One - Logistics SLD iSSUE
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am using SAP Learning Hub and trying to complete the Hands-on Practice for SAP Business One – Logistics.

However, I cannot access or log in to the SAP Business One system that should be provided for the exercises. I am not sure whether this is a system issue or if I missed any setup steps.

Has anyone experienced the same problem? What should I do to access the SAP Business One system?

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: Required Columns in Standard Report Analyze Stock in Date Range
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Greetings!!

We want two additional columns in the standard report "Analyze Stock in Date Range" in which the value of Stock Increase Quantity (Total Receipt Value) and value of Stock Decrease Quantity (Total Issue Value) is present so as user can know how much value of goods have been issued / received in that particular date range.

Therefore we request you to kindly add these two columns which will ensure a smooth busniess flow for us.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Unlocking Fiori Applications for Process Order Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Informative Siddhant!

entry.title: Re: find sql anywhere development files
entry.content:
@Jack_shueler, I found a better solution.

In configure.ac do the following:

AC_PROG_GREP
AC_PROG_AWK

[SQLANY=$(set | $GREP -E 'SQLANY[0-9]{1,}')]
[SQLANYVAR=$(echo "$SQLANY" | $AWK -F= '{ print $2 }')]

AC_SUBST(SQLANYVAR)

and then use SQLANYVAR in the Makefile.am.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: How to create new asset class and define account determination
entry.content:
Learn how to create a new asset class and define account determination.

Create a new account determination for the special machines

Step 1: Select Define Account Determination (102626).

Choose New Entries.

Step 2: In the Account Determination field, enter Z1600020. To confirm your entry, on your keyboard, press Enter.

In the Name of Account Determination field, enter Special Machines. To confirm your entry, on your keyboard, press Enter.

Choose Save.

Step 3: You have now defined account determination for Z1600020 Special Machines. Next, you define the accounts that are posted to the general ledger for that account determination.

To assign the G/L accounts to the Account Determination Z1600020, select Assign G/L Accounts (102622).

Select YCOA.

Double-click Assign G/L Account.

Step 4: All accounts of account determination 160020 Machinery and Equipment should be copied to new account determination Z1600020 Special Machines.

To find the account determination 160020, choose Position.

In the Account Determination field, enter 160020. To confirm your entry, on your keyboard, press Enter.

Choose Continue.

Step 5: Select all entries with Account determination 160020 Machinery and Equipment. Account determination 160020 consists of 29 different symbolic accounts.

Select all 160020 rows.

All 29 entries of account determination 160020 Machinery and Equipment that are to be copied are selected.

To copy all selected 29 Account Determinations 160020, choose Copy As...

Step 6: In the Account Determination field, enter Z1600020. To confirm your entry, on your keyboard, press Enter.

The new account determination Z1600020 was entered for all 29 selected entries.

To save the 29 copies, choose Save.

Account determinations Z1600020 Special Machines and 160020 Machinery and Equipment now have the same G/L accounts.

The next step is to update the G/L Account field so that the acquisitions of special machines are posted to the expected G/L account.

The program checks whether all G/L accounts specified in account determination exist in the company codes that use the chart of accounts YCOA. If accounts are missing, note them and maintain them in the general ledger. You have created the new account determination Z1600020 Special Machines.

Create a New Asset Class by copy

Step 1: Create a new asset class for special machines using the asset class 2000 (Machinery and Equipment) as a reference. Link the account determination for special machines to the new asset class.

Step 2: In the Define Asset Class (102606). In the Asset Class field, enter Z300. To confirm your entry, on your keyboard, press Enter.

Step 3: In the asset class description field, enter Special Machinery. To confirm your entry, on your keyboard, press Enter.

Master Data Layout, Number Range and Account Determination were transferred from the reference asset class. For special machines, only a different account determination should be used.

Step 4: To search for Account Determination, choose the input help.

Step 5: Select Account Determination Z1600020 Special Machines.

Step 6: After the Accounting Determination is selected, choose OK

Choose Copy.

Choose Save.

When you generate your new asset class by copying an existing asset class and changing this copy, you obtain a complete asset class containing the Asset Class Definition section and the Valuation View Dependent Settings section. If you create a new asset class without a reference, you only obtain the Asset Class Definition section and have to configure the Valuation View Dependent Settings section in a subsequent step completely.

entry.title: Re: June Developer Challenge - CAP Knowledge - Task 01 - Common types and aspects
Re: The Future of ABAP is Here: VS Code ADT, Zero-Config MCP, and AI Co-pilots

entry.title: Lookup formula in Calculation function
entry.content:
Environment: SAP Profitability and Performance Management 3.0 SP22, On-Premise.

Lookup formula in Calculation function: right-hand join key always quoted as string literal in generated HANA code

Hello,

I am trying to enrich my input data in a Calculation function by pulling fields from another Model Table via a Lookup formula, following the approach from the sample content and older community posts.

Setup:

  • Calculation type: Relative
  • Input function: Model Table 13852 (main stream)
  • Lookup tab: Model Table 13854 added
  • In the Action of my first rule, I want to fill the field COUNTERPARTY_TYPE from table 13854, joined on COUNTERPARTY_ID.

Formula I entered:

 
13854.COUNTERPARTY_TYPE[COUNTERPARTY_ID=COUNTERPARTY_ID]

Problem: In the generated HANA code, the right-hand side of the join condition is always wrapped in single quotes, so it is treated as a string literal instead of a field reference from the main stream:

 
sql
IFNULL((SELECT MAX(COUNTERPARTY_TYPE) FROM "SAPDB"."Y820HZL000513854"
        WHERE (COUNTERPARTY_ID = 'COUNTERPARTY_ID')), TO_NVARCHAR('')) AS COUNTERPARTY_TYPE

Because of this, the lookup never matches any row and always returns the empty default. The enriched field stays blank, and all my downstream rules that depend on it do not trigger.

What I already tried (each one re-activated and re-checked in the generated code):

Formula Generated WHERE clause
...[COUNTERPARTY_ID=M.COUNTERPARTY_ID]WHERE (COUNTERPARTY_ID = 'M.COUNTERPARTY_ID')
...[COUNTERPARTY_ID=COUNTERPARTY_ID]WHERE (COUNTERPARTY_ID = 'COUNTERPARTY_ID')
...[COUNTERPARTY_ID=$COUNTERPARTY_ID]WHERE (COUNTERPARTY_ID = '$COUNTERPARTY_ID')

In every case the right-hand value is quoted as a literal string. The main stream is aliased as AS M in the generated code, so I expected M.COUNTERPARTY_ID to work as a field reference, but it is quoted too.

My questions:

  1. How do I enter the main-stream field on the right-hand side of the lookup condition so that it is interpreted as a field reference and not as a string literal?
  2. Is there a dedicated field picker in the formula editor for this, instead of typing the field name as text?
  3. Is the bracket lookup syntax FID.FIELD[KEY=KEY] still supported in 3.0 SP22, or has the recommended approach changed (e.g. using the Lookup tab join configuration instead of a formula)

Any guidance on the correct syntax or configuration would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.content:

Here     you see the field is rendered as ObjectStatus in my ui5 smarttable and also in my rap preview app it works:

This is the XML UI5 Coding for the Smartform & Smartfield which is not rendered in the right way: 

 Any idea what is wrong?

Prasanth
SAP Support

entry.title: Post-SAP Sapphire briefing SAP Business AI Platform – GOVERN
entry.content:
Every week, there’s a new AI tool, a new agent, a new model.  Honestly, it can feel a bit like watching new apps appear on a teenager’s phone overnight.

Now imagine that happening inside an enterprise landscape.

That’s why we’re hosting the webinar “Post-SAP Sapphire briefing SAP Business AI Platform – GOVERN”.  We’ll dive into how SAP enables organizations to centrally discover, verify, and govern AI agents, LLMs, and MCP servers across different environments.  One place. Better visibility. Clearer accountability.

For partners, this opens an important conversation with customers.  AI adoption is accelerating, but governance, trust, and compliance still matter deeply.  In many cases, they matter more than the model itself.

If you joined SAP Sapphire conversations around Business AI, this session helps connect the dots with practical governance capabilities and real operational value.

Plus, bring your questions. We’ll end with a live Q&A session.

Register now.  https://partneredge.sap.com/en/library/education/psd/2026/may/e_oe_te_w_PSD_WEB_00014253.html

#SAP #SAPBTP #SAPPartners #SAPEcosystem #SAPBusinessAI #EnterpriseAI #DigitalTransformation #AICompliance

entry.title: Re: Collision Handling between Absences and Attendances in SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking - 1H 202
entry.content:
Hi @Swastik_Kaushal89 ,

No as of now, Attendance and Attendance Collision Resolution is not planned. This enhancement is specifically for Absence and Attendance Collision Resolution.

Can you please create an influence request with the requirement?

Kind Regards,

Priyanka

entry.title: Re: From XSUAA to AMS: Architecting S4HANA CAP Extensions with Policy-Based Authorization
entry.content:
Hello @Avinash_Vaidya ,
Thank you for this detailed explanation of the AMS concepts (vs. the XSUAA ones). Do you know whether we can find a "subsequent" blog post that addresses the question of how to mass-maintain user-to-policy assignments in SAP Cloud Identity Services? Since, beyond the RBAC vs. A- or PBAC paradigms, access management, including UAR, mass-user and access maintenance, reporting, etc., is what will make these concepts really workable for security administrators (and auditors).
Thank you
Stéphan

entry.title: Re: Collision Handling between Absences and Attendances in SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking - 1H 202
entry.content:
Hi @PriyankaAgarwal 

In the scenario described below, we believe an Admin Alert (or something else) should indeed be triggered.

We have a group of blue-collar workers who do not have access to SuccessFactors. Their only interaction with the system is through clock-in and clock-out registrations in an external time-recording system.

Absences are entered by administrative staff on behalf of these employees, as the employees themselves must first request the absence. However, if an administrator records an absence and, afterwards, an overlapping clock-in/out entry is registered in the external time-tracking system, this conflict may go completely unnoticed.

This is the issue we are facing. Is there a solution available to detect or prevent such overlapping records, for example through a warning or validation message?

entry.title: SAP DataSphere | Asking about CU Limitation and Notification
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert, 

Currently, we are starting to use SAP Datasphere and would like to monitor the system's Capacity Unit (CU) consumption. We also need to define limits and set up alerts in case usage exceeds the amount we have purchased.
However, based on our research, we have not found any SAP-released features related to CU limitation or notification available in the SAP Datasphere Portal (UI).
We would like to ask whether there are any functions in the SAP Datasphere Portal that allow us to configure CU usage limits and set up alerts.
If these features are not currently available, does SAP have a roadmap to develop such capabilities for SAP Datasphere?
We kindly request SAP to review and provide us with detailed guidance on this matter.

Thank you so much,

entry.title: Support Needed: Improvement Request – Enable Earlier “Make Decision” in Supplier Qualification
entry.content:
Hi everyone 😊 ,

I hope you’re doing well!

I’d like to share an improvement request we’ve submitted and kindly ask for your support. If you’ve faced similar challenges, your vote would mean a lot and help bring visibility to the topic.

Request link: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/374902

What’s the idea?

In Process Framework (Supplier qualification), currently, the “Make Decision” button only becomes available after all required supplier documents are received.

In real-life processes, this can be quite limiting:

  • Suppliers often need more time to review/sign documents
  • Delays are common and not always avoidable
  • Still, business decisions sometimes need to be made earlier

What we’re proposing:

We’re asking to allow the “Make Decision” button to be available right after questionnaires are sent, so that:

  • A status like “conditionally qualified” can be assigned early
  • Companies can proceed while being fully aware of missing documents
  • Transparency in the system is maintained without unnecessary delay

Why this matters:

From both a process and compliance perspective:

  • The system already allows decisions when documents are rejected
  • So it seems inconsistent that missing documents block decisions completely

Enabling this flexibility would better reflect real-world workflows and support more efficient supplier management.

If this resonates with you or your organization, I’d really appreciate your vote and support Thanks in advance, and happy to discuss your experiences as well!

Best regards,
Irina

entry.title: Re: Process Integration Pipeline Extension - Restart via Data Store
entry.content:
@philippeaddor 

Thanks for the heads-up, we'll look into fixing it. We have fixed a few identified bugs in the meantime a, but current focus is the Pipeline itself, but we are planning a change to this package too. 

Mate

This is a great problem right now in our org as user can able to use the unpurchased licences unintentionally and we want to stop this but SAP doesnot have any stop button so atleast a way to view those license

entry.title: Re: Private goals- Managers view private goals for direct...
entry.content:
Hi @VishaliElangovan 

Yes, you should provide the access below to the manager:

1- Private access permission in XML

2- Read or Write permission for goal plan fields in XML

3- Objective tab and Objective plan permission in RBP with target as direct reports.

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Note 3690029 – Integration Technologies and Frameworks in the Context of Clean C
entry.content: @MartinSommer thanks for your feedback. Now both notes referencing each other.

entry.title: Why It's Important to Activate New Apps and How to Do It (Short Version)
entry.content:
• 1 Background
  • 2 Identifying and Activating New Apps
  • 2.1 Identifying Apps with Successor App
  • 2.2 Identifying the Affected Business Roles
  • 2.3 Modifying the Affected Business Roles
  • 2.3.1 Activating the Successor app in the Phase-In Phase
  • 2.3.2 Deactivating the Predecessor app in the Business Roles in the Phase-Out Phase
  • 2.4 Finalizing the Transition
  • 3 Conclusion

1 Background

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, new apps are now delivered as inactive - and therefore not visible to business users - starting with release 2602. This is due to the underlying IAM apps are no longer activated automatically per default (see What's New entry Business Role Design with IAM Apps). You as customer therefore need to incorporate the required app activation step into your processes and tasks.

This blog describes the recommended procedure to get an overview of new inactive apps and how to activate them.

2 Identifying and Activating New Apps

We strongly recommend activating and assigning successor apps to end users as early as possible. This allows users to work with the new app in real business scenarios, verify that required functionality is covered, provide feedback if a feature is missing, and become familiar with the new experience without time pressure. Early activation helps avoid business disruptions and ensures a seamless user experience.

We advise customers to deactivate the predecessor app in the business roles once the successor app is active and has been successfully validated by your business users. Timely activation of the successor app is critical because, after deprecation, navigation from the SAP Fiori launchpad may automatically launch the successor app. If the successor app is not yet activated, this can cause broken processes and a disrupted user experience. Deactivating the old app while ensuring the successor is active ensures a smooth, uninterrupted transition.

2.1 Identifying Apps with Successor App

You can identify apps with successors in several different ways (both within and outside of your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system): 

  • Access the central SAP Note 2975653 information that provides access to all available SAP Notes that contain release-specific IAM change information. Go to the relevant release-specific SAP Note. Open one of the attached spreadsheets and select the tab TransactionsWithSuccessors and TransactionsDeprecated

  • Use the IAM Information System to analyse successor relationships between different IAM apps (you can also export the list of IAM apps with successors for a detailed analysis outside of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud system)

  • Use the Display IAM Apps app to identify apps where the successor app is introduced or the app is deprecated
    • Phase-In (Successor app introduced but app not yet deprecated): In the Status search filter, select Not Deprecated. In the Amount Successor search filter, enter >=1.

  • Phase-Out (App deprecated): Adapt the filter settings to search for deprecated IAM apps that are used in a business role. In the Status search filter, select Deprecated. In the Used in Business Roles search filter, enter >=1. 

2.2 Identifying the Affected Business Roles 

Identify the affected business roles by analysing which roles currently contain the predecessor app and therefore need to be updated with the corresponding successor app. You can do this using:

  • the IAM Information System app (check which IAM App is used in which Business Roles)

  •  the Display IAM Apps app (check Used in Business Roles):

 

2.3 Modifying the Affected Business Roles

2.3.1 Activating the Successor app in the Phase-In Phase

To make the successor app available to users, activate the corresponding IAM app and assign it to the relevant business roles. You can do this by:

Maintaining the business role in the Maintain Business Role app manually. The steps involved are:

  • Edit the business role
    • If the successor IAM app is delivered in the same business catalog, activate the successor IAM app
    • If the successor IAM app is delivered in another business catalog, add the business catalog / add the IAM app individually
  • Maintain necessary new restriction types in the business role

 

 

Maintaining the business role in the Maintain Business Role app using the Mass Change option. The steps involved are:

  • Select the business roles which are affected and need to include the successor app and select Mass Change

 

  • Select the Area IAM App Activation and activate the IAM apps (this will not add missing apps in case the app is not assigned to the business role!)
  •  Enter the IAM app ID of the successor app and review and confirm your changes

 

 2.3.2 Deactivating the Predecessor app in the Business Roles in the Phase-Out Phase

Once you have validated the successor app and confirmed that it meets all your business requirements, we strongly recommend deactivating the predecessor app for the relevant business roles. This step finalizes the transition, maintains process continuity, and ensures that users can only access the successor app.

  • Use the Adopt Changes button in the Display IAM Apps app to remove the predecessor app from the assigned business roles

 

  • Use the Mass Changes wizard to deactivate the apps in the business roles (similar to the activation of apps)

 

2.4 Finalizing the Transition

After completing the activation of the successor app in the business roles, additional follow-up activities are required to ensure consistency and usability. Here is a list of activities you need to consider:

  • Test all changes together with key users or authorization coordinators before rolling out the changes to your business stakeholders
  • Business catalog extensions need to be reapplied
  • Business role restrictions should be reapplied where necessary
  • Update the documentation of your authorization concept
  • Update the Launchpad Pages associated to the affected business roles
  • Transport your changes to the business roles to the Test and Production system
  • Clearly communicate the transition to end users, including any cutover activities, and to provide appropriate training and enablement materials for the successor apps
  • Advise business stakeholders to migrate their filters to the new app and update their My Home page

3 Conclusion

For more details, check out the following resources:

  • Manage App Replacements and Deprecations | SAP Help Portal
  • Switching to a New App Version | SAP Help Portal
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Identity and Access Management (IAM) Release Activities - Action Required
  • SAP Note 2975653 - Identity and Access Management (IAM): Central Change Overview for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - SAP for Me
  • Handling Succession of IAM Apps in SAP Cloud ERP (Part 1) – Product Expert Training
  • Handling Succession of IAM Apps in SAP Cloud ERP (Part 2) – Product Expert Training
  • SAP Note 3545277 - New Experience Switch in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: Overview of Apps - SAP for Me
  • SAP Activate for Upgrade of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA Cloud – New User Experience Switch Enhanced Explained - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Custom Section with Rating Scale in SAP SuccessFactor...
entry.content:
Hi @J_AM-1 

You can follow the suggestion given by @ParvatiRemadevi  if u dont want to calcualte the outcome in summary but if you need calcualtion then u need to define these as competencies in JPB/TIH and add a competency section and define these as hard coded/custom competencies in the form.

entry.title: Re: Form not being routed to the single user step
entry.content:
Hi @ArunimaGupta 

You need to make sure user is active in the system and have login permission in RBP

entry.title: Re: June Developer Challenge - CAP Knowledge - Task 02 - Content for common reuse types
Re: Manager rating also updated when selecting employee s...
entry.content:
Hi @sysfpathforward 

I have not faced this issue in any of my customer. You need to make sure correct rating option is configured in the section.

If only employee and manager are doing rating please use rating option 3

entry.title: Automatic Warehouse Task Creation at GR Flag not working
entry.content: Hi I am trying to use the Automatic WT creation at GR Flag at warehouse Process type level but its not working any idea why?

entry.title: Re: Performance Forms / How to view all forms in Performa...
entry.content:
Hi @dianadm 

If this person is responsible to launch the forms, please use create enroute copy option while launching the form. If note, please create a reprot and include document id to link the PDF of the form to view all forms via report in PDF format.

entry.title: Re: Payment run rejected by bank due to error of: Unable...
entry.content: Check this document - https://www.bacs.co.uk/bacs-schemes/getting-started/using-iso-20022-with-bacs/

entry.title: Re: Job-Specific Competencies Logic in PM Form
entry.content:
Hi @tekassf 

There is no way to control this as of now in system.

You need to make sure the employee is having correct job code during the form launch time.

entry.title: Re: Custom report : Stock In‑Out & Balance Report with Tr...
entry.content: Thanks for your reply and the information provided. I still have the following questions: Since the transaction currency is different from the company code currency, all amounts involve exchange rate conversion and result in exchange rate differences even if Material Ledger is activated with multiple currency types. Therefore, the customer's requirement is to calculate amounts directly in the transaction currency. Currently, we plan not to calculate the step-by-step rolling moving average price. Instead, we will calculate the moving average price for the selected query period using the following formula: Periodic Weighted Average Price = (Opening Amount + Current Period Receipt Amount) / (Opening Quantity + Current Period Receipt Quantity) I would like to ask the following questions: What is the underlying CDS view used to retrieve the inventory quantity on a specific date in the Material Inventory Values - Balance Summary query you provided? Can we use the CDS view I_MaterialStockTimeSeries to get the inventory quantity on a specific date? If we calculate the periodic material average price using a custom formula, can we create a new calculated field in the query to define the calculation logic and store the result? If not, how should we implement the formula calculation and store the calculated values? thanks a lot.

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS Error "Define one key field as a representative key field." persists despit
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: New SAP Community - Profile Signatures
entry.content: I haven't updated the signature generator tool yet.  Just did an emergency fix to the signatures themselves.  I'll be sure to update the signature generator tool as soon as I can - next day or so.

entry.title: Re: Collision Handling between Absences and Attendances in SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking - 1H 202
entry.content:
Hi @FL19 ,

If an admin alert with a warning is needed, can you please create an influence request with the requirement detailed out?

Kind Regards,

Priyanka

entry.title: Re: New SAP Community - Profile Signatures
entry.content: @thomas_jung Indeed, the signatures themselves work fine now. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: What would you do if you need to replicate sales bill...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question.

Can you please check the Sales API documentation about Billing APIs?
APIs for Sales

I hope this helps.

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: End-to-End Forecasting with SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content: Great work, @ilya_kirzner ! Thanks for sharing!

entry.title: Re: June Developer Challenge - CAP Knowledge - Task 02 - Content for common reuse types
Re: What is clean core anyway?
entry.content:
Hi Rajen,
Nice article, informative and thought-provoking.
What is your take on the overlap between clean core and autonomous enterprise?
That seems to me to be an unanswered question atm...
Thanks
Denver
